**As a** [Student]  
**I need** [a search bar to find courses by topic]  
**So that** [I can quickly find the lessons I need]

### Acceptance Criteria
**Given** I am on the home page  
**When** I type "Python" into the search bar  
**Then** I should see a list of Python-related courses
